title: Cognitive Workload 8-level arithmetic
description: This dataset comprises multimodal neurophysiological recordings from 18 participants performing an 8-level arithmetic task designed to manipulate cognitive workload. The dataset includes 19-channel EEG, 3-lead ECG, and pupillometry data synchronized via Lab Streaming Layer, with 8 difficulty levels (including baseline). Raw data were converted from Lab Streaming Layer/XDF format to BIDS-compliant BrainVision format with comprehensive event annotations and physiological recordings.
methods_description: Data were collected using a combined mobile EEG+ECG system (19-channel 10-20 montage, 250 Hz sampling, Ag/AgCl electrodes with linked-ear reference) and Pupil Labs Pupil Core eye tracker synchronized via Lab Streaming Layer. Participants completed a 60-second baseline followed by 70 arithmetic questions (10 per difficulty level) presented for 6 seconds each, with difficulty defined by Q-value ranges. ECG was recorded with 3-lead configuration and pupillometry via infrared eye tracking with asynchronous sampling.
